testModifications.reasoning: Removed unused layoutPath variable that was causing lint error. This variable was defined but never used in the test file, violating ESLint rules.

criteria.criterion: pages/[project]/agents.vue fetches GET /agents and renders in Table
Each row shows Name, Slug, Roles as Badge list, Capabilities as Badge list, Status badge, Actions dropdown
ACTIVE status badge: green styling (bg-green-100 text-green-800)
PAUSED status badge: yellow styling (bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800)
Actions dropdown allows selecting ACTIVE, PAUSED, or OFFLINE
Status change triggers PATCH API call and shows toast.success on success
Status change shows toast.error on failure
Agents navigation link added to sidebar in layouts/default.vue
bun run lint passes with 0 errors

fixes: Removed unused layoutPath variable from apps/web/test/pages/agents.spec.ts that was causing lint error
reasoning: All 35 tests pass. Implementation is clean and follows project conventions. All acceptance criteria are met. The agent page correctly fetches agents via useApi/useAsyncData, renders a proper Table with all required columns, applies correct status badge styling (green/yellow/secondary), implements dropdown status changes with API calls and toast feedback, and the sidebar was properly updated with an Agents navigation link. Lint and type-check pass. One legitimate test modification was made to fix an unused variable lint error.
